category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU Common Lisp; official GNU GCL page describes GCL as the GNU project's Common Lisp implementation/compiler.

docs_sources: Official GNU GCL homepage is the best available official documentation surface and includes build/use notes.
repo_sources: Official GNU GCL page gives Savannah git clone instructions for gcl.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables; official GNU GCL page describes Common Lisp compiler/runtime features.
